title: 10 Pcs Champagne Silver Gift Bags Medium with 10 Tissue Paper Handles Bow Ribbon Multipack Presents Paper Gift bags for Wedding Baby Shower Bridesmaid Party
features: 【Material】Paper gift bags with handle are made of paper material,thick and not easy to break
【Tissue Decoration】The tissue Paper row ribbon and gift bag are separated, you can decorate the bag according to your needs, which can make your gift bags with handles more exquisite and high-end

【Size Details】The single size of the gift bags is 12.6x10x4.3inch/32x25x11cm, the size is big enough to hold many small gifts, the set includes 10 gift bags, the quantity is enough to meet your daily needs

【DIY Use】The Champagne Silver background party favor bag with elegant bow ribbon allows you to use your imagination, you can decorate the gift bag by writing, graffiti, sticker printing, etc. To make your party more unique and impressive

【Application】White paper bags are suitable for many occasions, such as weddings, birthday parties, valentine's day gifts, Christmas gift happy new year gift baby showers, graduation parties, can be used for party gift bags, shopping bags, retail bags, merchandise bags, many uses to meet different needs

specifications_table.Occasion: Baby Shower,Weddings, birthday parties, valentine's day
